title: KHAS Theatre Department Summer Camp will be held this year on July 22-23, 2024!

KHAS Theatre Department Summer Camp will be held this year on July 22-23, 2024!

The quota for the free summer camp is

100

people. A total of 100 people will be divided into four groups and a three-hour workshop will be held with each group at Sahne KHAS (Kadir Has University – Cibali Campus).

The group’s day and time information will be announced via e-mail to personal contact addresses after registration is completed. (The form will be closed to participation after the first 100 people.)

You can apply for Summer Camp by filling out the form below:

https://form.khas.edu.tr/tiyatro

Quick Search

Through this form, you can access news, announcements, faculties and departments, base scores, our academic staff and administrative personnel, and their internal phone numbers.
